name: Crock-Style Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces salt pork (cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the water and beans to boiling.
2. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1-1/2 hours.
3. Remove from heat and pour into a bowl. Cover and chill.
4. Drain the beans; reserve 1 cup of liquid.
5. Transfer the beans and reserved liquid to a crockery cooker.
6. Stir in the pork, onion, molasses, brown sugar, and mustard.
7. Cover and cook on low heat setting for 12-14 hours.
8. Stir occasionally.
Makes 6 servings.
